title: Command the Center
subtitle: Turn a big pawn center into an attack
summary: You own the center with pawns on d4 and e4. Use the space to push the engine back and open lines.

body.goal: Use your central pawns to gain space, develop with threats, and outplay the engine.
body.successHint: Advancing in the center (d5) or resolving the tension gains room for your pieces.
